<h2><a href=https://www.codewars.com/kata/589519d1f0902e01af000054/train/javascript target="_blank">Perimeter sequence</a></h2><h3>7 kyu</h3><h2 id="perimeter-sequence">Perimeter sequence</h2><p>The first three stages of a sequence are shown.</p><p><img alt="blocks" src="data:image/png;base64,"></p><p>The blocksize is <code>a</code> by <code>a</code> and <code>a ≥ 1</code>.</p><p>What is the perimeter of the <code>n</code>th shape in the sequence (<code>n ≥ 1</code>) ?</p>
